name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying compression, compact response rendering, bounded intent evaluation, and exact shadow lineage.

interface.shortDescription: Verify compression, compact responses, intent candidates, and shadow lineage.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, verifies deterministic compression, renders schema-bound compact model output through trusted local renderers, evaluates bounded intent compilers, and creates content-free evidence for exact shadow-only lineage without transparent prompt interception, semantic-equivalence claims, or cache authorization.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
Inspect this Compact Response contract, render its candidate locally, and verify the content-free witness.
Evaluate this held-out promotion evidence and emit a manifest only if every gate passes.
Evaluate this payload-free intent-cache evidence and emit a shadow qualification only if every gate passes.
Create or inspect a shadow-only Cache Admission Passport Statement for this qualification.
Create or inspect a shadow-only Cache Admission Decision Statement for this exact Passport and eligible hit.
Evaluate this intent normalizer offline in shadow mode.
Evaluate an OpenAI-compatible intent compiler with explicit network opt-in and a request budget.
